articles.title: Previous AIADMK govt. failed to act effectively on crimes against women, alleges Tamil Nadu CM Stalin
articles.description: He said that during the DMK rule, in 86% of cases involving crimes against women and children, chargesheets were filed within 60 days

topStories.description: Meta issued a statement on Wednesday to warn Android and iPhone users about a fake WhatsApp app that was being used for spying on users, according to a report. The US-based tech giant reportedly said...

topStories.title: France Jails Four for Alleged Terrorism in Foiled BofA Bombing
topStories.description: French authorities have charged and jailed an adult and three teens aged 16 to 17 over a foiled bombing attempt near the Bank of America Corp. office in Paris that was seen as possible retaliation for the war with Iran.

topStories.description: The secretary of state framed the strike as not only necessary to impede Iran's nuclear progress but also to dismantle its growing arsenal of conventional weapons.

dailyNews.description: Donald Trump's quote explores the dual nature of ego, highlighting its role in self-promotion and success while cautioning against its extremes.

dailyNews.title: Why Trump wants to fire Pam Bondi? Who will replace her?
dailyNews.description: President Trump is considering replacing Attorney General Pam Bondi with EPA administrator Lee Zeldin amid dissatisfaction over Bondi's performance and backlash from his base regarding the Epstein files.

dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran was the ‘bully of the Middle East’ but is ‘no longer a threat’.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages’
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the US will bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages where they belong' by striking hard.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges countries ‘get involved’ in war on Iran if they can’t get fuel
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump says nations that rely on oil from the Strait of Hormuz should build up some delayed courage.

dailyNews.title: JONATHAN TURLEY: Justice Jackson's 'Chiles' dissent reveals narrow view of the First Amendment
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson issued a lone dissent in Chiles v. Salazar, warning free speech protections for counselors risk 'grave harm' to Americans.

dailyNews.title: MORNING GLORY: President Trump’s big speech on Iran — what will it do?
dailyNews.description: President Trump's address on Operation Epic Fury raised questions about NATO's future, Hugh Hewitt argues, as European allies failed to support the U.S.-Israel campaign against Iran.

dailyNews.title: What you need to know: 5 key takeaways from Trump’s Iran address
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed the nation Wednesday, saying the United States’ “core strategic objectives" in Iran are “nearing completion"—just a month after “Operation Epic Fury" began.

dailyNews.title: Giant leap for mankind: America's space edge is at stake as Artemis II heads to the moon
dailyNews.description: Artemis II marks America's return to deep space as China aggressively pursues its own long-term lunar presence, raising the stakes for U.S. space leadership.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran ‘no longer a threat’ after 32 days — outlines next phase of US war
dailyNews.description: Trump declares Iran "no longer a threat" after a 32-day military campaign, claiming nuclear sites were destroyed by B-2 bombers and warning of more strikes.

dailyNews.title: Billy Porter blames Trump as jobs dry up after 'performative wokeness' wave
dailyNews.description: Billy Porter said the era of "performative wokeness" is over and arts job opportunities are drying up, speaking out on the shifting entertainment landscape.

dailyNews.title: Trump is right about NATO’s weakness; the real question is how does America fix it
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz crisis exposed NATO's deep fault lines as Germany refused to act and Spain denied airspace, revealing burden-sharing failures.

dailyNews.title: Iran war's "core strategic objectives are nearing completion," Trump says
dailyNews.description: Trump says he expects the U.S. war with Iran to end within several weeks despite unrelenting attacks from both sides and Iran's iron grip on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Trump says U.S. will hit Iran very hard "over the next 2 to 3 weeks" | Special Report
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed the nation Wednesday night about the Iran war. Tony Dokoupil anchored CBS News' special report.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. 'nearing completion' of its strategic objectives in Iran
dailyNews.description: In his address to the nation, President Trump said that the U.S. is “nearing completion” of its strategic objectives in Iran, but did not offer specifics about when he would consider those objectives met.

dailyNews.title: 'We had to do it ourselves': Trump forges ahead in Iran without traditional U.S. allies
dailyNews.description: In his prime-time speech, President Donald Trump argued that the U.S. had to act on its own to neutralize the threat from Iran because many of America’s allies wouldn’t help.

dailyNews.title: Despite Trump's claims, there's no indication Iran's regime has lost power, Western officials and experts say
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said in his address to the nation on Wednesday night that regime change has occurred in Iran because all of the country's original leaders are dead

dailyNews.title: Trump's Iran threats alarm war crimes experts
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump risks turning America into a "rogue state," a former U.S. ambassador for war crimes issues warned after the president threatened to bomb power stations and desalination plants in Iran.
